head.hi: The Secretary of State to President Wilson

div.p:
My Dear Mr. President: In connection with the instructions which were agreed upon by you, Mr. Lloyd George, Mr. Clemenceau and Mr. Orlando on March 25, 1919, with regard to the sending of Commissioners from the Peace Conference to make inquiries in certain portions of the Turkish Empire which are to be
permanently separated from Turkey and put under the guidance of governments acting as Mandatories for the League of Nations, I respectfully request your authorization to sign the appended lettersNeither printed. addressed to Mr. H. C. KingPresident of Oberlin College, Ohio. and Mr. Charles R. Crane,Treasurer of the American Committee for Armenian and Syrian Relief. designating them as the two American Commissioners.
